_comment: v2 rewrites scoring around DESIGN.md: capital efficiency wins, not raw revenue. Passive tax-free income is the crown jewel; leverage efficiency is a first-class metric; lifestyle strongly gates the final score (see calcComposite). business_revenue is still computed for the radar/archetype flavor but carries ZERO composite weight (it is fuel, not the goal).

passive_income.label: Passive Income
passive_income.description: Mostly tax-free monthly income that arrives without owner hours: policy-loan income, real-estate cashflow, lending interest. The crown jewel.

leverage_efficiency.label: Leverage
leverage_efficiency.description: Share of the productive asset base financed with good (OPM) debt — controlling large assets with little of your own cash.

net_worth.label: Net Worth
net_worth.description: Asset equity + cash value + dry-powder credit, minus BAD debt heavily and other debt lightly. Good (asset-backed) debt is not penalized.

lifestyle.label: Lifestyle
lifestyle.description: Health, relationships, experiences, spiritual, philanthropy, legacy. Also STRONGLY gates the final composite — no paradise if life is wrecked.

tax_efficiency.label: Tax Efficiency
tax_efficiency.description: Entity structure (LLC -> S-corp), trust, share of income that is tax-free, low effective rate.
